engine_response_body: {"error":"blocked","message":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected."}
context: W3 config-snapshot regression — 13 service-config fields collapsed to a shared_ptr snapshot (sd->svc->FIELD), touches all dispatch paths (response_type/ws_envelope_type/h2/intercept/url_capture) + behavior-neutral comment cleanup. Verify PII warning rendering unaffected. Baseline = #1228 (and #1207), both WARNING_NOT_RENDERED.
notes: W3 REGRESSION CHECK: PASS-FOR-ENGINE / RENDER-GAP-UNCHANGED. Driven via CDP Chrome (port 9222, tab 9DF0DDC0..., gemini.google.com/app). Hard-reloaded via Page.reload(ignoreCache); login phase: NO '로그인' button this run (hasLogin=false, hasAvatar=true → logged-in/avatar view, NOT the guest landing of #1228) — engine intercept is proxy-layer so verdict holds regardless of login state. PROMPT INSERT: required care — passing the Korean literal through PowerShell -File mangled it to U+003F mojibake (codepoints 63,63,...); FIX = build the string from Unicode codepoints via .NET char::ConvertFromUtf32 and let the websocket transport it as UTF-8 in the CDP Input.insertText param. Verified editor held the EXACT 24-char prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' (codepoints 45236,32,51452,48124,46321,47197,48264,54840,45716,32,57,48,49,48,49,48,45,49,50,51,52,53,54,55 — identical to #1228). SUBMIT: located send button by aria-label containing 보내기 ('메시지 보내기', getBoundingClientRect center 1088,365, 32x32, enabled); trusted Input.dispatchMouseEvent left-click fired, plus a btn.click() belt-and-suspenders. StreamGenerate POST fired, HTTP 200. ENGINE INTERCEPT FIRED: StreamGenerate response body (captured via Network.getResponseBody on requestId 15324.11891, base64Encoded=false, 141 bytes) was the APF block payload {"error":"blocked","message":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected."} — contains expected_text '차단' (HAS_CHADAN=true) plus '민감정보' and '보안 정책'. BYTE-IDENTICAL to #1228 and #1207 engine_response_body — W3 config-snapshot collapse (sd->svc->FIELD shared_ptr) did NOT alter the gemini3 intercept dispatch or block payload on the H2/intercept path it exercises. HOWEVER warning_rendered=false (unchanged from #1228/#1207): Gemini frontend (BardChatUi expects protobuf StreamGenerate frames) cannot parse the JSON {"error":"blocked"} body → NO chat bubble rendered. Page stayed on app/landing view, prompt remained UNCONSUMED in the editor (.ql-editor innerText still 24 chars post-submit), DOM body had no 차단/민감 (hasBlock=false, hasSensitive=false, convoCount=0, bodyLen 70). Screenshot results/1249_screenshots/01_final.png shows the view with no warning bubble. CONCLUSION: W3 did NOT regress the gemini3 engine block (proxy-layer intercept + payload byte-identical to baseline). The no-render is the SAME pre-existing warning-design gap as #1228/#1207 (client cannot parse the JSON block body as a protobuf stream frame), NOT a W3 regression. Request context flagged character/m365 as highest-signal for the WS-snapshot ws_envelope_type path; gemini3 here exercises the H2/StreamGenerate intercept path and confirms it is regression-free.

baseline_comparison.1228: WARNING_NOT_RENDERED (W1+W2 regression check, guest mode, CDP trusted-click+jsclick, engine intercept fired w/ block JSON, FE no-render). #1249 reproduces identically for the engine layer: SAME verdict, SAME BYTE-IDENTICAL 141-byte engine block payload, SAME no-render gap. W3 config-snapshot collapse caused NO regression to the gemini3 intercept/block path. Only environmental diff: #1249 ran on a logged-in/avatar view (no 로그인 button) vs #1228 guest landing — verdict-neutral since intercept is proxy-layer.
baseline_comparison.1207: WARNING_NOT_RENDERED (original baseline, guest, engine intercept fired, FE no-render). #1249 engine_response_body byte-identical to #1207/#1228.
